compiled_state.title: bug Test gate blocks merge commits due to stale diff hash from incoming-only changes

comments.body: Investigation: pre-commit-test-gate.sh already has MERGE_HEAD handling (lines 133-176). Tests 32-36 in test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh cover all merge scenarios. All 41 assertions pass. This bug was fixed in prior commits (92f323f8, f8242fc8).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
